Petition For Orders: 1. To Remove Trustee Of The David E. O. Rath Trust Dated January 23, 1986; 2. T
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Continued To Jan-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kurt Rifbjerg for beneficiary Amy March (via Zoom).
Amanda Ebey for trustee Kathleen Franklin, who was also present (via Zoom).

The matter come on for hearing on petition for orders to remove trustee, etc.

Counsel reported that discovery was ongoing and requested a continuance to a date after the holiday season. Counsel also reported that settlement discussions were continuing.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to January 27, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, for further status.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Orders: 1. To Remove Trustee Of The David E. O. Rath Trust Dated January 23, 1986; 2. T
Off Calendar May-20-2025 Continued To Sep-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kurt Rifbjerg appeared via zoom for Amy Marsh (petitioner).
Amanda Ebey appeared via zoom for and with Kathleen Franklin (trustee).

Counsel reported that they need additional time for depositions.

The court continued the matter to September 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time to complete necessary depositions. The parties were ordered to file a joint status report by September 9, 2025 addressing the status of discovery, outcome of mediation efforts, and readiness for trial.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

Petition For Orders: 1. To Remove Trustee Of The David E. O. Rath Trust Dated January 23, 1986; 2. To Suspend Trustee; 3. To Appoint Successor Trustee; 4. To Appoint Temporary Trustee; 5. Awarding Damages For Breaches Of Trust By Trustee Kathleen Franklin; 6. Awarding Damages For Receipt Of Trust Assets By Kathleen Franklin;7. To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Feb-11-2025 Continued To May-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kurt Rifbjerg for Amy Marsh, Beneficiary (via Zoom).
Amanda Ebey for Kathleen Franklin, Trustee (via Zoom).

The court acknowledged the joint case management statement and noted that both parties were open to either judicial mediation or non-binding arbitration. The court expressed a preference for mediation, noting that non-binding arbitration may not be productive. Ms. Ebey confirmed that a prior probate mediation session was unsuccessful. The court inquired about retrying mediation and asked whether returning to the previous mediator would be beneficial. Ms. Ebey indicated a preference for selecting a new mediator.

Counsel reported that discovery is not yet complete. The court informed counsel of its policy of not setting trial dates until discovery is completed.

The court continued the matter to May 20, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time to complete necessary discovery and mediation. The parties were ordered to file a joint status report by May 13, 2025 addressing the status of discovery, outcome of mediation efforts, and readiness for trial.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Orders: 1. To Remove Trustee Of The David E. O. Rath Trust Dated January 23, 1986; 2. To Suspend Trustee; 3. To Appoint Successor Trustee; 4. To Appoint Temporary Trustee; 5. Awarding Damages For Breaches Of Trust By Trustee Kathleen Franklin; 6. Awarding Damages For Receipt Of Trust Assets By Kathleen Franklin;7. To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Continued To Feb-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kurt Rifbjerg for Amy Marsh, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Amanda Ebey for Kathleen Franklin, Objector/Trustee (via Zoom).

Mr. Rifbjerg reported that mediation was unsuccessful and indicated that this case is on track to proceed to trial, with discovery pending. He estimated the trial would take 1-2 days. The court proposed issuing a case management order to facilitate trial preparation, requiring parties to submit a joint case management statement that includes witness lists, facts that remain in dispute, exhibits to be offered, status of discovery, etc. Both counsel agreed to this suggestion.

The court continued the petition to February 11, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court will issue a case management order setting a case management hearing for the same date and time. Counsel were directed to prepare and file a joint case management statement prior to the hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Orders: 1. To Remove Trustee Of The David E. O. Rath Trust Dated January 23, 1986; 2. To Suspend Trustee; 3. To Appoint Successor Trustee; 4. To Appoint Temporary Trustee; 5. Awarding Damages For Breaches Of Trust By Trustee Kathleen Franklin; 6. Awarding Damages For Receipt Of Trust Assets By Kathleen Franklin;7. To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Continued To Jul-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Rifbjerg appeared by zoom for and with Amy Marsh (petitioner) by zoom.
Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for and with Kathleen Franklin (trustee/respondent) by zoom and specially appearing for and with Chloe Milne (beneficiary) by zoom.

Discussion was held regarding the notice issue, self dealings on behalf of the trustee, the amended petition to include only the sub-trust, etc. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than June 18, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 25, 2024. The Petition for Orders to Remove Trustee, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on July 2, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The parties are to obtain a copy of the meditation order from the court's website.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.
